metadata.description: A marketplace for skills and tools for agentic Power BI development.

plugins.name: tabular-editor
plugins.description: Agentic development tools for Power BI semantic models with Tabular Editor.

plugins.name: pbi-desktop
plugins.description: Connect to Power BI Desktop's local Analysis Services instance to enumerate models, query with DAX, refresh data, and modify metadata via TOM. No MCP server required.

plugins.name: pbip
plugins.description: Skills for working with Power BI Project (PBIP) files including TMDL authoring and project operations.

plugins.name: semantic-models
plugins.description: Skills for auditing and standardizing naming conventions in Power BI semantic models.

plugins.name: reports
plugins.description: Skills for Power BI report design and custom visuals (Deneb, R, Python, SVG).
